name: charonling--stock-research-team
description: Multi-role AI stock research team. When a user asks to analyze a stock (e.g. "分析贵州茅台", "analyze NVDA", "帮我看看AAPL"), this skill orchestrates technical, fundamental, macro, and sentiment analysts, followed by a bull-bear debate, trading strategy, risk review, and a director's final verdict with a composite score. Supports both A-shares and US stocks via MCP tools.
